_doc: Targeted text corrections applied to raw wikisource text during transform. Keys are 'vol:page' (zero-padded vol, ws page number). Each entry is a list of {from, to} replacements applied literally to raw_text before any other processing. Use sparingly — for transcription typos only, not for rendering issues.

26:244.from: The secretary y had already accepted a bribe
26:244.to: The secretary had already accepted a bribe
